blocks.content: The week before homecoming Daisy found a dress at a shop on Main Street — dark green, simple — and sent Savannah a picture of it on her disposable camera that she'd have to wait to develop. She described it on AIM instead.
it's dark green. kind of simple. i think it works
it's going to look amazing on you
i don't need to. kit's going to lose his mind
yes. a group that includes kit. who is going to lose his mind.
Daisy closed the chat. Looked at the dress on the back of her door. Then went to bed.
